title: Korak 47

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
text = 'Hello Zaira'
shift = 3
alphabet = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'
encrypted_text = ''

for char in text.lower():
    if char == ' ':
        encrypted_text += char
    else:
        index = alphabet.find(char)
        new_index = (index + shift) % len(alphabet)
        encrypted_text += alphabet[new_index]
    print('char:', char, 'encrypted text:', encrypted_text)
challengeFiles.seed:
text = 'Hello Zaira'
shift = 3
alphabet = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'
encrypted_text = ''

for char in text.lower():
    if char == ' ':
        encrypted_text += char
    else:
        index = alphabet.find(char)
        new_index = (index + shift) % len(alphabet)
        encrypted_text += alphabet[new_index]
    print('char:', char, 'encrypted text:', encrypted_text)

tests.text: Trebalo bi da ispišete 'encrypted text:', encrypted_text nakon vašeg kruga for.
Morate imati print('char:', char, 'encrypted text:', encrypted_text) u vašem kodu.

description: Zatim, promenite vaš poziv za print() ili ispišite 'encrypted text:', encrypted_text i postavite ga izvan petlje for, ili da kodirani niz znakova bude ispisana samo jednom.
